scripts.dev: concurrently -n "Vite,Backend,Electron" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:backend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:backend: tsc src/backend/server.ts --outDir dist/backend --module esnext --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop && node dist/backend/server.js
scripts.dev:electron: tsc src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts --outDir dist/main --module esnext --moduleResolution node && electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && npm run build:backend && electron-builder
scripts.build:main: tsc src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts --outDir dist/main --module esnext --moduleResolution node
